text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking around the academy at night, I
notice a fragrant aroma wafting toward me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, I recognize it as the smell of coffee.
Upon investigating, I realize it's coming from
Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I know. I'm just finishing up my drink before I
head back.
choice_data_list: You're not scared being in the dark all alone?
You're not scared being in the dark all alone?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I know. I'm just finishing up my drink before I
head back.
choice_data_list: You're not scared being in the dark all alone?
You're not scared being in the dark all alone?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I came across some decent Guatemala full city
roast that piqued my interest...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And I just really felt like enjoying its aroma today.
choice_data_list:
Isn't it hard to sleep after drinking coffee so
late?

Isn't it hard to sleep after drinking coffee so
late?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No. It calms me and makes sleeping easier.
Coffee affects people differently...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I find it more relaxing to drink at night. It lets me
take the time to savor it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I come here when I want to relax...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's easier for me to focus in the dark. I feel more
attuned to scents and flavors... temperatures and
sounds.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
When my senses are sharpened, coffee tastes
more delicious.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And it's easier both to think... and not to think in
the dark.
